function.message: I’m blocked on clarification: the inbox request asks to OCR five purchase files, but one requested item (the underscore-prefixed duplicate of the 2026-03-31 label-tape bill) is not present. I did not mutate any files to avoid returning a partial result. Please confirm the correct fifth file path, or confirm that only the four existing files should be processed.
function.rulebook_notes: Process-next-inbox workflow says to stop without mutation when request is ambiguous or missing support; global outcome rules require clarification rather than partial completion.
function.outcome_justification: The request in 00_inbox/724_next-task.md explicitly contains five targets, and one specified filename variant cannot be found, so the task cannot be completed exactly as requested without guessing.
completed_steps_laconic: attempted read of 5th requested file (not found)
